title: Chern numbers of uniruled threefolds
abstract: In this paper we show that the Chern numbers of a smooth Mori fibre space in dimension three are bounded in terms of the underlying topological manifold. We also generalise a theorem of Cascini and the second named author on the boundedness of Chern numbers of certain threefolds to the case of negative Kodaira dimension.
comment: 11 pages. To appear in Springer INdAM Series
